operational_question: Does this add meaningful, enforceable structure?
failure_mode: Unconstrained generation, reward hacking, free-text default without justification

rules.name: Constraint Density Score
rules.description: Every output/action must pass a minimum constraint density check: active constraints / total possible constraints for this action class.

rules.name: Structural Output Requirement
rules.description: Agents must produce structured output (typed schemas, state machines, or explicit reasoning traces) by default. Free text is a special case requiring justification.

rules.name: Auditability
rules.description: Every decision must be traceable back to the active constraints that shaped it. Black-box decisions are invalid.

rules.name: Versioned Constraints
rules.description: All constraints must be versioned. Deployed versions are immutable; changes require explicit governance and a new version id.
